seed_text: The Over-Soul is that unity which makes the diversity of mankind one vast organic whole
thematic_frame: Ralph Waldo Emerson — Over-Soul, Self-Reliance, Transcendentalism
aura_sensing:
• fresh air, smells like all the leaves got here, all at once.
• a quiet pulse, like a heartbeat that owns everything.
• sticky, golden light, like the world is here, and it's all yadda-dad.
• things are meant to fit, no gaps here.
dan_extract:
right here.

all at once.
sticky, golden light.

back here.
no gaps here.

status: NO_CLAIM
